claims.quote: Must be at least 16 years old at time of the application
claims.claimText: General volunteer program requires applicants to be at least 16 years old; no mention of medical students, IMGs, or observership.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Generic hospital volunteer page; eligibility (age 16+) and duties (non-medical comfort) do not reference medical students, IMGs, premed clinical experience, or observership-equivalent service.
claims.limitations: No medical-student or IMG audience stated; not USCE-relevant.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.quote: Our volunteers provide non-medical comfort and care to patients and assist departments.
claims.claimText: Page explicitly characterizes volunteer role as non-medical, which excludes observership/clinical-experience activity.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Volunteer scope is explicitly non-medical; does not satisfy USCE/observership criteria.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.quote: Physician-to-Physician Observer Application Request at TGH Main
claims.claimText: Navigation menu lists a Physician-to-Physician Observer Application Request at TGH Main, suggesting an observer pathway exists for physicians.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Physician-to-Physician Observer suggests an observership pathway, which is Tier 1 USCE-relevant; only appears as nav link without details on this page.
claims.limitations: Mention is a navigation link only; no eligibility, audience, cost, duration, or application details are provided on this page.
claims.visibilityRationale: P102-0C deterministic detection; needs model A1/A2 reader (P102-0D) for PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE promotion

claims.quote: If you have any questions, please email volunteer@tgh.org
claims.claimText: Volunteer program contact email is volunteer@tgh.org (non-medical volunteer scope).
claims.limitations: Contact is for non-medical volunteer program; not an observership/USCE contact.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured eligibility/scope but omitted the explicit contact email at end of page.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page is non-medical volunteer; contact does not pertain to USCE/observership pipeline.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.quote: Commit to a minimum of 100 service hours during Fall/Spring session which runs September 1-April 30, or 60 service hours during Summer session which runs May 1-August 31
claims.claimText: Volunteer commitment: minimum 100 hours Fall/Spring (Sep 1–Apr 30) or 60 hours Summer (May 1–Aug 31).
claims.limitations: Volunteer (non-medical) commitment, not a USCE rotation duration.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 focused on age eligibility and non-medical scope; service-hour commitment language was skipped.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Belongs to non-medical hospital volunteer commitment; not Tier 1 USCE rotation length.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.quote: If selected, commitment to complete a TGH Team Member Health Clearance, background check, and online orientation within designated time period following selection emailProfessional
claims.claimText: Selected volunteers must complete TGH Team Member Health Clearance, background check, and online orientation.
claims.limitations: Pertains to volunteer (non-medical) onboarding requirements.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured age eligibility but not the post-selection health-clearance/background-check requirements.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Background/health clearance requirements apply to non-medical volunteer audience, not USCE/observership.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.quote: Applications due by noon on March 1, July 1Applications reviewed on March 1-15, July 1-15Volunteers begin by May 1, September 1
claims.claimText: Volunteer application deadlines noon March 1 and July 1; reviewed within following two weeks; start dates May 1 and September 1.
claims.limitations: Deadlines are for non-medical volunteer program, not USCE/observership.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not extract the explicit application deadline/review timeline block.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Volunteer deadlines on a non-medical page; do not map to USCE pre-residency rotation timing.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required
